message:
debug: Add comprehensive debug output to trace codegen crash

Added detailed debug output throughout the generate() function to pinpoint
the exact location where test_raise.py compilation crashes (exit code 139).

Debug output covers:
- Phase 1: Module analysis
- Phase 1.1: Call graph building
- Phase 1.5: Source file directory
- Phase 1.6: Import collection
- Phase 2: Class registration
- Phase 2.1: Function/variable registration
- Phase 2.5: Mutation analysis
- Phase 3: Import generation (all subphases)
- Phase 3.7: Module assignments and aliases
- Phase 3.8: Optional import detection
- Phase 4: Magic constants (__name__, __file__)
- Phase 4.1: Source directory emission
- Phase 4.5: Closure wrapper types
- Phase 4.6: Test factory analysis

This verbose logging will help identify the exact function causing SIGSEGV.
Once crash location is found, these debug prints can be removed.
